descriptions.net_investment_latest: Latest fortnight FPI net-investment snapshot: equity, debt, hybrid, mutual fund, and AIF flows for the most recently published reporting period.
descriptions.net_investment_quarterly: Quarterly FPI net-investment details for the current calendar year, broken out by asset class across each completed quarter.
descriptions.registry_categories: FPI category-wise registration counts: how many registered Foreign Portfolio Investors fall into each SEBI registration category.
descriptions.registry_list: List of registered Foreign Portfolio Investors and Foreign Institutional Investors currently on NSDL's registry.
descriptions.registry_pendency: DDP-wise pendency of FPI registration applications: how many applications are awaiting action at each Designated Depository Participant.
descriptions.sector_list: Fortnightly sector-wise FPI investment activity: net inflow/outflow by industry sector for the most recent reporting fortnight.
descriptions.trades_debt: Trade-wise debt data of FPI activity: individual debt trade records reported by Foreign Portfolio Investors.
descriptions.trades_equity: Trade-wise equity data of FPI activity: individual equity trade records reported by Foreign Portfolio Investors.
